runtimes.reason: Transcode the recorded WebM to true H.264 MP4 on export, and extract mono 16k WAV audio from a recording before Whisper captioning, via window.tinyAtom.media.runFfmpeg.
Read duration, resolution, and stream info of persisted recordings for accurate library metadata and export validation, via window.tinyAtom.media.runFfprobe.
Generate real auto-captions (VTT/SRT/JSON) from a recording's extracted audio via window.tinyAtom.speech.transcribe.
Local Whisper model weights required by whisper-cli for offline transcription via window.tinyAtom.speech.transcribe.
